Package common.binary

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    BinaryInput
    Defines the core data-reading contract for binary streaming components, supporting standard stream positioning and navigation operations.
    BinaryOutput
    Defines the core data-writing contract for binary streaming components.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractBinaryStream
    Base class for binary input and output streams that provides common position management, byte-order handling, and mark/reset support.
    AbstractRandomAccessStream
    Base class for file-backed binary streams that use a RandomAccessFile for random-access I/O.
    ByteArrayReader
    Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
    ByteArrayReaderOld
    Performs in-memory reading of primitive data types from a byte array.
    ByteValueConverterBB
    ByteBuffer-backed utility for decoding primitive values and structures from byte arrays.
    RandomAccessReader
    A seekable binary reader backed by a RandomAccessFile.
    RandomAccessWriter
    Provides a seekable binary stream writer backed by RandomAccessFile.
